title: MVS Criticality Override Registry
description: Manual protection layer (overrides.yaml). Nodes marked protected are never pruned regardless of usage. Every override MUST carry a written justification and an owner.

overrides.description: Per-node override records, keyed by node id.

protected.description: When true the node survives pruning even below the usage threshold.

justification.description: Why this node is protected. Required and non-empty — an override without a stated reason is rejected.

owner.description: Person or team accountable for the override (for periodic review).
